name: Ghost Git Extension
description: Git operations extension for Ghost CLI with AI-powered commit generation, security scanning, version management, and merge resolution

rateLimit._comment_cir: CIR (Committed Information Rate): 100000 bytes/min sustained rate for AI API calls. Supports typical LLM request/response sizes (2-10KB prompts, 5-50KB responses) at normal operation frequency (5-10 requests/min = 50-500KB/min sustained).
rateLimit._comment_bc: Bc (Burst Committed): 500000 bytes committed burst capacity (5x CIR). Accommodates burst scenarios like initial project analysis, batch commit generation, or large diff processing where 5-10 requests fire in quick succession before returning to sustained rate.
rateLimit._comment_be: Be (Burst Excess): 1000000 bytes excess burst capacity (2x Bc). Handles exceptional spikes for large repository diffs (100KB+), comprehensive merge conflict AI analysis, or verbose AI responses during complex operations. Provides headroom for AI response variability without red-dropping legitimate traffic.
